plan.title: Port the source-tree scanner gates (verify_scm_boundary / rule_ownership_lint / code_structure_validate / verify-stubs) to TypeScript

narratives.Description: Port the four source-scanning gates -- scripts/verify_scm_boundary.py, scripts/rule_ownership_lint.py, scripts/code_structure_validate.py, and scripts/verify-stubs.py -- to TypeScript with cache-off golden parity vs the Python oracle. These scan tracked source for policy violations: scm_boundary forbids raw gh outside scm.py, rule_ownership_lint checks rule-section ownership, code_structure_validate enforces module-structure rules, and verify-stubs forbids stray stub markers. All are leaf gates with no inter-dependency; three-state exits are preserved. File-walk/glob behavior must match the Python ordering so diagnostics render in the same sequence. Any regex ported MUST be a linear recognizer (no polynomial backtracking) to avoid CodeQL js/polynomial-redos while staying byte-identical.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
1. Create packages/core/src/verify-source with TS ports of the four scanners, with vitest unit tests covering clean / each-violation-class / config-error per gate.
2. Add packages/cli/src/verify-source-parity.ts that drives the TS functions and a python -c invocation of the frozen Python gates over shared source fixtures and asserts byte-identical output (stdout + exit code) with cache off.
3. Wire the module into index.ts, package.json subpath exports, vitest.config.ts alias, tasks/ts.yml (verify-source-parity into parity-all), and a CI golden-diff step.
narratives.UserStory: As a directive maintainer, I want the source-tree scanner gates in TypeScript, so that the scm-boundary, rule-ownership, code-structure, and stub checks run on the TS engine with the same findings, ordering, and exit codes as the Python modules.

items.title: scanner findings + ordering + exit codes preserved

narrative.Acceptance: Running the TS verify-source gates returns the same three-state exit code and the same ordered findings the Python verify_scm_boundary / rule_ownership_lint / code_structure_validate / verify-stubs modules produce for the clean and each-violation-class fixtures.
Running the verify-source-parity binary returns exit 0 and renders byte-identical output to the Python source-scanner oracle with cache off.

expected_outputs: New packages/core/src/verify-source module with vitest unit tests
Byte-identical parity vs the four Python source-scanner gates under cache-off
swarm.missing_traces_justification: #1530 Wave-5 framework-internal TS port traced to GitHub issue #1783 and umbrella epic #1530; no specification.vbrief.json spec-section applies to maintainer tooling.

references.title: Issue #1783: feat(ts-migration): port the remaining verify/validate gates to TS (Wave 5)
